title: ownCloud
description: ownCloud is a self-hosted file sync and share platform for storing, accessing and collaborating on your files across devices.
installation: The official owncloud/server image initializes itself on first boot using the OWNCLOUD_ADMIN_* and OWNCLOUD_DB_* environment variables, so no manual setup wizard is needed. It is built and tested against MariaDB/MySQL plus Redis (provided here by the mariadb and valkey add-ons). Rotate the mariadb add-on credentials and the OWNCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD ('owncloud' default) after first login. OWNCLOUD_TRUSTED_DOMAINS / OWNCLOUD_DOMAIN are wired to the app host so the instance accepts requests at its public URL; add any extra domains there. The valkey add-on is password-less, so OWNCLOUD_REDIS_HOST points at rfr-owncloud-valkey-readwrite with no password set. User files, config and the SQLite-free data dir live under /mnt/data (persisted by the owncloud-data volume). For large instances raise the app pod size and PHP memory limit. An external object/S3 store is optional and not required for a base install.
